description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Country Corn Flakes breakfast cereal, featuring a colorful and inviting front panel with a large, bold logo and an image of a bowl of corn flakes with milk and fruit. The front also displays the General Mills logo and a small promotional banner for breakfast games. The back of the box is covered with playful, illustrated games and activities for children, including a farm-themed maze and matching game, all in bright, cheerful colors. One side panel contains detailed nutritional information and ingredients in a dense, text-heavy format, while the other side features a 'Get Up and Go' message with a photo of a bowl of cereal and additional promotional text. The top flaps of the box are open, revealing the interior, which is likely to contain a sealed bag of cereal. The overall design is typical of breakfast cereal packaging, with a focus on family-friendly graphics and clear branding.
description: A colorful cardboard box of Country Corn Flakes cereal with playful graphics, branding, and open top flaps. The box features a bold logo, a bowl of cereal image, and games for kids on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Country Corn Flakes logo, a bowl of cereal, the General Mills logo, and a breakfast games promotion.
description_view_1: This narrow side view displays the nutrition facts and ingredients in small text, with the product name at the top.
description_view_2: The back view is covered with colorful children's games and illustrations, including a farm maze and matching activity.
description_view_3: The opposite side panel features a 'Get Up and Go' message, a photo of cereal, and additional promotional text.
attribute_brand_logo: General Mills logo is visible on the upper left front, circular with a stylized 'G' in white and red.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front shows a bowl of corn flakes and the word 'Corn', indicating plain corn flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the left side panel in small text.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Front panel includes a 'Breakfast Games' promotion in a red banner and the back is covered with colorful children's games and illustrations.
